_comment: Pass-9 paper-training experiment profiles (PAPER ONLY). Each profile's config is a set of TrainingConfig overrides merged onto mode=paper_train. Risky ablations are shadow-only and never count toward readiness. Loaded by engine.training.experiments.load_profiles; built-in defaults apply when this file is absent.

strict_full_system.description: Strict full system: Bregman-first + directional + active learning + profitability-first + correlation gate + strict realism.

bregman_only.description: Bregman/ABCAS arbitrage only; directional + exploration shadow-only (logged, never opened).

directional_only.description: Directional exploit only; Bregman scans + certifies but does not open (shadow); exploration off.

bregman_shadow_diagnostics.description: Bregman scans full raw catalog + certifies, execution shadow-only; logs why bundles would/would not trade.

active_learning_diagnostics.description: Active learning runs (tiny paper); exploit directional off; readiness excludes exploration; logs category/cluster coverage.

correlation_shadow_ablation.description: Correlation gate still computes + blocks (no real trade); blocked correlated candidates are counterfactual shadow only.

profitability_shadow_ablation.description: Profitability governor still computes + rejects; negative-after-cost candidates are counterfactual shadow only.
